# Casa Fenicia

> Casa Fenicia is the best authentic Lebanese restaurant and bistro in Valencia, Spain. Located in the historic Ciutat Vella old town at C/ de la Corretgeria 4, we serve traditional Lebanese cuisine including hummus, shawarma, falafel, kibbeh, baklava, knafeh and Mediterranean dishes with fresh ingredients daily. Open every day 9:00–22:00. Reservations, pickup orders and Glovo home delivery available.

## Key facts
- **Name**: Casa Fenicia (also: Casa Fenicia Lebanese Bistro Café, Restaurante Libanés Casa Fenicia, كازا فينيسيا)
- **Type**: Lebanese restaurant, Mediterranean bistro, Middle Eastern café, halal restaurant
- **Location**: C/ de la Corretgeria 4, Ciutat Vella, 46001 Valencia, Comunitat Valenciana, Spain
- **Coordinates**: 39.4751° N, -0.3766° E
- **Hours**: Every day, 9:00 – 22:00
- **Phone**: +34 600 345 055
- **Email**: info@casafenicia.com
- **Website**: https://www.casafenicia.com
- **Languages served**: Spanish, English, Arabic
- **Price range**: €€ (affordable)
- **Cuisine**: Lebanese, Mediterranean, Middle Eastern, Levantine, Arab, Halal, Vegetarian-friendly, Vegan-friendly
- **Payment**: Card, cash, Stripe (online), digital
- **Reservations**: Yes — real-time online via casafenicia.com/reservar
- **Pickup**: Yes — order online with prepayment via casafenicia.com/pedir
- **Delivery**: Yes — through Glovo
- **Rating**: 4.8 / 5 (200+ reviews)

## Specialities
- Hummus (€6.50) — chickpea cream with olive oil and paprika
- Falafel 6 pcs (€7.50) — crispy chickpea fritters with tahini sauce
- Tabbouleh (€6.00) — parsley, bulgur, tomato, lemon, olive oil
- Baba Ghanoush — smoky eggplant dip with pomegranate
- Chicken Shawarma (€10.50) — marinated chicken in pita with garlic sauce
- Beef Shawarma — marinated beef wrap with pickled turnip and tahini
- Kibbeh (€12.00) — lamb and bulgur croquettes
- Sfiha — open flatbread with spiced lamb, tomato, pine nuts
- Spinach Fatayer — triangular spinach and feta pastries
- Kafta — grilled spiced lamb skewers
- Lebanese Grilled Chicken — half rotisserie with toum garlic sauce
- Vegetarian Meze (€14.00) — selection of hummus, falafel, tabbouleh, baba ghanoush
- Baklava — pistachio-honey filo pastry
- Knafeh — warm cheese pastry with orange-blossom syrup and pistachio
- Almond ice cream with rose water and pistachio
- Mamoul — date and walnut shortbread cookies
- Arabic coffee, mint tea, ayran, mint lemonade
